capacity_evidence.device: one Blackhole chip from a P300c endpoint (TT_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0)
capacity_evidence.stage_scope: The optimized batch-one path releases the inherited dense expert tensors after loading routed BFP8_B sparse-expert weights and stores the configured 128-entry K/V cache in BFP8_B. Optimized prefill is validated through the complete configured S=128 extent. At the advertised HF length, the inherited dense causal-mask design alone still exceeds allocator-reported DRAM before weights, input, KV cache, outputs, and temporaries.
capacity_evidence.unprobed_interval: 129 through 131071; current_supported_context equals the configured cache/mask extent and is a validation boundary, not a claim that the HF-advertised length fits this dense-mask design

notes: The functional starting point validates prefill through S=17, and the fused stage extends non-aligned validation through S=33. The optimized stage preserves non-aligned S=3/17/33 behavior and validates prefill at the complete configured S=128 cache/mask extent, so the supported validation boundary advances without reducing capability. Decode is validated at positions 3 through 18, including repeated paged updates and trace replay. The batch-one optimized cache uses BFP8_B; its tile-padded storage is smaller than BF16, while current-token K/V remain BF16 inputs to attention before cache writes. The dense-mask design remains proven infeasible at the HF target; contexts above the configured extent were not probed. A different long-context memory policy is deferred.

fused_decoder_stage.capacity_change: No supported-context reduction; current_supported_context advances from 17 to the largest fused prefill validation S=33.

optimized_decoder_stage.cache_storage_change: BFP8_B replaces BF16 for persistent K/V. For this 1x8x128x64 cache pair, the nominal payload drops from 262144 BF16 bytes to 131072 BFP8 mantissa bytes plus block-exponent metadata.
optimized_decoder_stage.capacity_change: No supported-context reduction; current_supported_context advances from 33 to the complete configured and PCC-validated S=128 extent.

emit_provenance.collective_collapse: Full Hugging Face weights replace emitted shards; attention and expert all-reduces plus routing mesh partition are absent from runtime.

dtype_policy.functional_baseline: BF16 weights, activations, and cache; TILE layout; DRAM by default
dtype_policy.exception: The emitted router promotes its activation and linear result to FP32 before BF16 top-k; decode heads use one workload-derived L1 height shard.
dtype_policy.optimized_policy: BF16 activations, residuals, norms, router, and attention weights; BFP8_B routed expert weights with LoFi sparse matmuls; BFP8_B persistent K/V cache; current-token K/V remain BF16 before cache writes.
dtype_policy.deferred: Complete full-model datatype-frontier selection remains a later datatype-sweep stage.
